meaning: adj.婕斿寰楀緢鏈夊姏鐨刟dv.寮烘湁鍔涘湴
examples: This is the Orlando Furioso by the great sixteenth-century Italian poet Ariosto.
Music can be happy, sad, romantic, sleepy, furioso, healing-all kinds of things. But what is it? It's up to you!
The three acts of Vivaldi's Orlando Furioso are all set on Alcina's magical island.
